tagline: Learn from the moments you already live.

designSystem.style: Dark space-inspired theme with vibrant indigo-purple primary and warm amber accents. Card-based layout with subtle gradient borders, rounded corners, and micro-interactions. Emphasizes knowledge and growth through a deep cosmic aesthetic with glowing accent colors.

screens: Today - Context Cue Detection with real-time moment detection, 7-day streak tracker, and expandable lesson cues tied to calendar/location
Learn - Micro-Lesson Cards browser with subject filtering, step-by-step lesson detail view with progress dots and quick facts
Scan - Photo-to-Concept Mode with viewfinder UI, sample scan objects, and instant lesson unlock flow
Curriculum - Daily Life Curriculum with subject tracks, progress bars, streak counters, and next lesson previews
Review - Memory Boost Reviews with retention scoring, new real-world context delivery, and spaced repetition feedback
